## Summary

- 

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` when UI behavior changes
- [ ] `npm run test:a11y` when UI/accessibility changes
- [ ] `npm run benchmark`, `npm run benchmark:browser` or `npm run benchmark:workflow` when performance-sensitive code changes

## Checklist

- [ ] No draw.io trademark, stencil or copied template asset was added.
- [ ] File-format changes include migration and round-trip tests.
- [ ] New UI is reachable by keyboard and has accessible labels.
- [ ] Import/export paths validate or sanitize untrusted input.
- [ ] Documentation or changelog was updated when user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] I have the right to contribute these changes under the project's MIT license.
- [ ] Any added assets, fixtures, templates or copied text have clear provenance and compatible licensing.
